title: astragalus hancockii
intro: Astragalus hancockii, also known as Hancock's milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to China. It is a plant used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which can help the body adapt to stress and fight off infections. The medicinal properties of Astragalus hancockii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for health issues such as cardiovascular disease, diabetes, and respiratory problems. Astragalus hancockii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
